scripts.purpose: candor_bridge.py — explanation before assertion (D-1, discernment).
scripts.title: Anti-Patronization

lens.math: scores an explanation across condescension, unearned confidence, evasion, and opacity, tracing each point to its span.
lens.prog: an audit that returns the offending text, not just a number.

scripts.purpose: certify_finding.py — a court-deployable certificate over a Chiron finding (B-3, hardened).
scripts.title: The Certificate

lens.math: scores a finding against the Daubert / FRE-702 factors and binds the evidence under a Merkle root with a replay seed.
lens.prog: emits a structured, reproducible attestation carrying an explicit, honest legal_status.
lens.concept: turn a recovered fact into a court-ready, replayable record — an input a human decision can stand on, never the decision itself.

scripts.purpose: CHIRON — The Invariant Engine.
scripts.title: The Invariant Engine

lens.math: argmin over typed generator classes of the two-part MDL code L(M)+L(s|M) in exact rationals, accepted only if it predicts withheld terms at exact equality; otherwise INCOMPRESSIBLE.
lens.prog: one self-contained file: collapse()/articulate() codec, owner-signed certificates, an offline HTTP console; no third-party deps in the core path.
lens.concept: recover the exact rule beneath a codified surface, prove it on data it never saw, or honestly refuse — never a confident guess.

artifact.what_was_discovered: All 12 Chiron core gates pass: exact collapse recovers and verifies generators on held-out terms, refuses the incompressible, and the president escalates unsafe actions by construction.
artifact.what_would_falsify: Any core gate failing — a false-verify, a missed escalation, or exec-of-string in the core path — would break the claim.

last_run.stdout_tail:
CHIRON core gates: 12/12 passed.
  CHIRON GREEN — exact knowledge, honest wisdom, bounded agency, one file.

scripts.purpose: chiron_artifact — one emit path for every runnable script in the vault.
scripts.title: The Memorial

lens.math: a dual-view certificate (machine evidence + human claim) admitted only if it carries a non-empty falsifier.
lens.prog: quick() emits a signed record to artifacts/<script>/; refuses any claim with no stated way to break it.
lens.concept: every run can leave proof of what it found, why it is believed, and the one thing that would falsify it.

artifact.confidence: high (gate is enforced in code, demonstrated below)
artifact.what_was_discovered: A shared dual-view certificate (machine_view + human_view) now exists; any script can memorialize its run in one call.
artifact.what_would_falsify: A certificate that emits despite an empty what_would_falsify field would break the honesty guarantee.

lens.math: recovers a classical transform and key by inverting it under the engine's language model; a known pair recovers the key directly.
lens.prog: Caesar / affine / substitution / transposition / base-n / Morse, ciphertext-only; seeds a cryptography basis.
lens.concept: decoding is just inverse recovery — the same collapse, run backwards through a transform.

scripts.purpose: Chiron vs. conventional compression — an honest comparison, both directions.
scripts.title: Versus the Compressors

lens.math: head-to-head against gzip / bz2 / lzma: a constant-size law that regenerates terms general compressors cannot produce.
lens.prog: measures stored size and predictive power side by side.
lens.concept: compression that understands — it stores the rule, not just smaller bytes.

cross_examine.py — The Defense Attorney (Chiron Jurisprudence Suite).

lens.math: an adversarial search for a counter-reading that would defeat the finding.
lens.prog: stress-tests a claim by trying to break it.
lens.concept: a finding is only as strong as the hardest cross-examination it survives.

scripts.purpose: density_emotion.py — competing hypotheses as a decohering quantum mixture.
scripts.title: The Decoherence Channel

lens.math: competing readings as a density matrix evolved by a Lindblad CPTP semigroup with a deterministic half-life; von Neumann entropy decays as interpretations decohere toward one.
lens.prog: complete-positivity and trace preservation asserted at every step; deterministic; emits a signed certificate; 8/8 selftest.
lens.concept: model ambiguity as physics — rival interpretations interfere and settle, with a provable, honest collapse rather than a hand-waved one.

artifact.what_was_discovered: Competing hypotheses decohere under a Lindblad channel; von Neumann entropy rises as the superposition collapses toward a commitment, validated across the self-test.
artifact.what_would_falsify: A run where the channel is NOT CPTP-valid at some step, or where identical input yields a different decoherence rate / entropy trail, would break the claim.

scripts.purpose: SEMIC  —  Semantic Invariant Calculus (deterministic core)
scripts.title: The Semantic Invariant Calculus

lens.math: edge-set energy E(S)=α|S|+Σ|Oᵢ △ S| is separable per edge, giving the closed-form argmin S*={e : count(e) > (n+α)/2} in O(N·m); the MDL collapse equals the T→0 limit of the Gibbs sampler.
lens.prog: pure-stdlib; surface_skeleton → collapse → certify; typed classes H1–H5; exhaustive/separable/branch-and-bound solvers agree; 56/56 gates.
lens.concept: the recovery discipline lifted from integers to meaning: find the shared invariant of a family of texts, verify on held-out members, refuse a contaminated pool.

artifact.what_was_discovered: All 56 SEMIC gates pass: the deterministic MDL collapse coincides with the zero-temperature limit of the Gibbs sampler, meaning families verify and cross-pools are refused with no false-verify.
artifact.what_would_falsify: A single gate failing (a cross-pool family the collapse marks verified, or argmin diverging from the T->0 Gibbs limit) would break the claim.

last_run.stdout_tail:
[PASS] G56 config defaults reproduce in-source constants

  56/56 gates passing

semic_energy.py — the three-level epistemic stack over semic.
scripts.title: The Energy Stack

lens.math: three levels — exact collapse (L1), the constraint manifold (L2), and a Gibbs measure p_T(S)∝exp(−E(S)/T) ranking (L3); landscape entropy separates a flat (ambiguous) from a peaked (decisive) basin.
lens.prog: builds only on semic's exact core; three_level() returns CERTIFIED or, on refusal, explicitly UNCERTIFIED energy-ranked candidates — it never certifies at L3.
lens.concept: stay exact wherever possible; only when exact recovery refuses do you explore approximations, always labelled uncertified.
